name: CVE-2026-23744-MCPJam-Exploit
description: A proof-of-concept exploit for CVE-2026-23744 - MCPJam Inspector Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability. This tool demonstrates the security flaw in versions <=1.4.2 and helps security researchers verify patches. For authorized testing and educational purposes only. Includes multiple payload options, command execution, and session management.
